prompt_en: Say: The lawsuit was filed by the legal firm yesterday afternoon.
expected_es: La demanda fue presentada por el bufete de abogados ayer por la tarde.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form (fue), natural construction (fue presentada por), agreement, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'ser' in the preterite tense for passive voice with an agent, 'fue presentada por'.

prompt_en: Say: The delivery deadline will be extended by the management due to unforeseen complications.
expected_es: El plazo de entrega será ampliado por la dirección debido a complicaciones imprevistas.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form (será), natural construction (será ampliado por), agreement, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'ser' in the future tense for passive voice with an agent, 'será ampliado por'.

prompt_en: Say: The insurance premium has been significantly increased by the company this year.
expected_es: La prima del seguro ha sido aumentada significativamente por la compañía este año.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form (ha sido), natural construction (ha sido aumentada por), agreement, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'haber' + 'ser' in the past participle for the present perfect passive voice, 'ha sido aumentada por'.

prompt_en: Say: The residential development is managed by a new consortium.
expected_es: La urbanización es gestionada por un nuevo consorcio.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form (es), natural construction (es gestionada por), agreement, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'ser' in the present tense for passive voice with an agent, 'es gestionada por'.

prompt_en: Say: The excessive workload has been reduced by implementing new software.
expected_es: La carga de trabajo excesiva ha sido reducida mediante la implementación de nuevo software.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form (ha sido), natural construction (ha sido reducida mediante/por), agreement, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'haber' + 'ser' in the past participle for the present perfect passive voice, 'ha sido reducida'.

prompt_en: Say: The detailed police report was drawn up by the officers at the scene of the accident.
expected_es: El atestado detallado fue redactado por los agentes en el lugar del accidente.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form (fue), natural construction (fue redactado por), agreement, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'ser' in the preterite tense for passive voice with an agent, 'fue redactado por'.

prompt_en: Say: The legal guardianship will be assumed by the grandparents after the hearing.
expected_es: La tutela legal será asumida por los abuelos después de la audiencia.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form (será), natural construction (será asumida por), agreement, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'ser' in the future tense for passive voice with an agent, 'será asumida por'.

construction: Ser passive voice (by agent) with modal
prompt_en: Say: The occupational hazard must be evaluated periodically by the safety committee.
expected_es: El riesgo laboral debe ser evaluado periódicamente por el comité de seguridad.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form (debe ser), natural construction (debe ser evaluado por), agreement, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'deber' + 'ser' + past participle for 'must be' in passive voice, 'debe ser evaluado por'.

prompt_en: Say: Digital literacy is promoted by various government programs.
expected_es: La alfabetización digital es fomentada por diversos programas gubernamentales.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form (es), natural construction (es fomentada por), agreement, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: Use 'ser' in the present tense for passive voice with an agent, 'es fomentada por'.

prompt_en: Say: The grade transcript must be legalized by an official notary before submission.
expected_es: El certificado de notas debe ser legalizado por un notario oficial antes de su presentación.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form (debe ser), natural construction (debe ser legalizado por), agreement, and target vocabulary/collocation.
